description.en: Create, search, and manage all Nginx domains.
description.zh-CN: 创建、查询和管理所有 Nginx 域名。

filteredDescription.en: Adjust the search or filters and try again.
filteredDescription.zh-CN: 调整搜索或筛选条件后重试。

emptyDescription.en: Create the first domain and a v1 draft; live Nginx will not change immediately.
emptyDescription.zh-CN: 创建第一个域名和 v1 草稿，线上 Nginx 不会立即改变。

deleteDescription.en: This domain is not published yet. Deleting will archive the Domain; historical drafts remain in the database.
deleteDescription.zh-CN: 该域名尚未发布。删除后会归档 Domain，历史草稿仍保留在数据库中。

createdAlertDescription.en: Live Nginx is unchanged. Test the draft first; safe publish will be wired up after the runtime image spike.
createdAlertDescription.zh-CN: 线上 Nginx 尚未改变。可先测试草稿，安全发布将在 runtime image spike 完成后接入。

description.en: Current live version and recent runtime status.
description.zh-CN: 当前线上版本和最近运行状态。

description.en: Primary domain, aliases, and runtime projection.
description.zh-CN: 主域名、别名和运行投影。

description.en: The current draft remains editable; publishing freezes it into an immutable version.
description.zh-CN: 当前草稿可继续编辑，发布后冻结为不可变版本。

description.en: {{count}} route(s), matched by Nginx longest-prefix.
description.zh-CN: {{count}} 条路由，按 Nginx 最长前缀匹配。

empty.en: No routes added; non-ACME requests will return 404 after publish.
empty.zh-CN: 尚未添加路由，发布后非 ACME 请求将返回 404。

description.en: Certificate issuance is an independent flow, not implicitly triggered by publish.
description.zh-CN: 证书申请是独立流程，不由发布按钮隐式触发。

description.en: Edit standard prefix locations under the server. Unpublished drafts update in place.
description.zh-CN: 编辑 server 下的普通前缀 location。未发布草稿会原位更新。

description.en: After publish, requests other than ACME challenge will return 404.
description.zh-CN: 发布后除 ACME challenge 外的请求将返回 404。

description.en: The route is saved into the current full draft; it will not publish automatically.
description.zh-CN: 路由保存到当前完整草稿，不会自动发布。

description.en: Deletion updates the current draft; live config will not change immediately.
description.zh-CN: 删除会更新当前草稿，线上配置不会立即改变。

description.en: Configure HTTPS, request certificates, and track the independent issuance and activation flows.
description.zh-CN: 配置 HTTPS、申请证书并跟踪独立的签发与激活流程。

description.en: The certificate is still referenced by the 503 runtime server but is not serving traffic. Auto Renew keeps running and may consume CA quota; disable Auto Renew and publish to stop.
description.zh-CN: 证书仍被 503 runtime server 引用，但当前不提供业务服务。Auto Renew 会继续运行并可能消耗 CA 配额；如需停止，请关闭 Auto Renew 并发布设置。

description.en: Issuance status and config publish are independent.
description.zh-CN: 签发状态与配置发布相互独立。

description.en: Active certificates enter renewal 30 days before expiry.
description.zh-CN: Active 证书会在到期前 30 天自动进入续期。

description.en: Order status comes from the server-side persisted state machine; the page does not infer ACME results.
description.zh-CN: 订单状态来自服务端持久化状态机，页面不会自行推断 ACME 结果。

cleanupFailedDesc.en: Certificate result is unaffected; the system will keep retrying automatically.
cleanupFailedDesc.zh-CN: 证书结果不受影响，系统会继续自动重试。

preparingDesc.en: Account and order keys are persisted; the server is obtaining the real challenge from the CA.
preparingDesc.zh-CN: 账户和订单密钥已持久化；服务端正在向 CA 获取真实 Challenge。

challengesDescDns.en: Add the corresponding TXT for each hostname; do not overwrite other records with the same name.
challengesDescDns.zh-CN: 为每个 hostname 添加对应 TXT；不要覆盖同名的其他记录。

challengesDescHttp.en: HTTP token is served by the system's public endpoint.
challengesDescHttp.zh-CN: HTTP token 已由系统公开端点提供。

activationDesc.en: Issuance is complete; config version and publish result are not written back to the ACME Order.
activationDesc.zh-CN: 签发已完成；配置版本和发布结果不会回写 ACME Order。

description.en: Manage response headers for the server or a specific route. Unpublished drafts update in place.
description.zh-CN: 管理 server 或指定 route 的响应 Header。未发布草稿会原位更新。

description.en: After selecting a template you can still modify name, value, scope, and Always.
description.zh-CN: 选择模板后仍可修改名称、值、作用域和 Always 设置。

description.en: Start from a recommended template, or add a custom header.
description.zh-CN: 可从推荐模板开始，或添加自定义 Header。

description.en: Saving only creates a draft; it will not publish automatically.
description.zh-CN: 保存只创建草稿，不会自动发布。

description.en: Deletion updates the current draft; live config will not change immediately.
description.zh-CN: 删除会更新当前草稿，线上配置不会立即改变。

description.en: Supplement the small set of server directives not yet covered by the visual forms.
description.zh-CN: 补充可视化表单尚未覆盖的少量 server 指令。

warningTitle.en: Advanced config may cause test or publish to fail
warningTitle.zh-CN: 高级配置可能造成测试或发布失败

warningDescription.en: Only one whitelisted directive per line; blocks, include, dynamic modules, and file or process capabilities are forbidden.
warningDescription.zh-CN: 每行只允许一条白名单指令；禁止 block、include、动态模块及文件或进程相关能力。

description.en: Generated after server-level headers and before business locations.
description.zh-CN: 生成在 server 级 Header 之后、业务 location 之前。

fieldDescription.en: Up to 16 KiB; directive arguments cannot contain comments or blocks.
fieldDescription.zh-CN: 最多 16 KiB；指令参数不能包含注释或 block。

description.en: MVP whitelist, {{count}} entries.
description.zh-CN: MVP 白名单，共 {{count}} 项。

description.en: Published versions are immutable; the current draft updates in place until it is frozen by publish.
description.zh-CN: 已发布版本不可变；当前 Draft 会原位更新，直到发布后冻结。

description.en: Creating a Domain generates an editable draft, which becomes immutable after publish.
description.zh-CN: 创建 Domain 后会生成可编辑草稿，发布后成为不可变版本。

description.en: The current live v{{active}} will keep serving until the new rollback version passes full config test and reload. The system will copy the target snapshot to create a new version and will not modify history.
description.zh-CN: 当前线上 v{{active}} 将保持服务，直到新回滚版本通过完整配置测试并成功 reload。系统会复制目标快照创建一个新版本，不会修改历史记录。

diffDetected.en: {{count}} semantic change(s) detected. Confirming will create v{{next}} and a rollback task.
diffDetected.zh-CN: 检测到 {{count}} 项语义变化。确认后将创建 v{{next}} 和回滚任务。

diffLoading.en: Calculating diff against the current live version…
diffLoading.zh-CN: 正在计算与当前线上版本的差异…

description.en: View recent structured access/error logs for the current Domain.
description.zh-CN: 查看当前 Domain 最近的结构化 access/error 日志。

descriptionDetailDraft.en: {{summary}}. The current draft is still editable

description.en: Grouped by business object, independent of text line numbers.
description.zh-CN: 按业务对象归类，不依赖文本行号。

empty.en: No business differences between the two versions.
empty.zh-CN: 两个版本没有业务差异。

description.en: Create a Domain and a v1 draft. Live Nginx is not modified until publish.
description.zh-CN: 创建 Domain 和 v1 草稿。发布前不会修改线上 Nginx。

dialogDescription.en: Diff → Test → Publish. Test results are bound to the current draft checksum; publish will still rerun a full nginx -t.
dialogDescription.zh-CN: Diff → Test → Publish。测试结果与当前草稿 checksum 绑定，发布时仍会重新执行完整 nginx -t。

noChanges.en: No semantic difference between the current draft and the live version.
noChanges.zh-CN: 当前草稿与线上版本没有语义差异。

testPassedDesc.en: Test result is bound to the current Version and checksum.
testPassedDesc.zh-CN: 测试结果已绑定当前 Version 和 checksum。

testingDesc.en: The system is generating the candidate config and running nginx -t.
testingDesc.zh-CN: 系统正在生成候选配置并执行 nginx -t。

draftChanged.en: Draft has changed; please review the diff and test again.
draftChanged.zh-CN: 草稿已变化，请重新查看 Diff 并测试。

dirtyWarning.en: Save the current page changes before opening the publish wizard
dirtyWarning.zh-CN: 请先保存当前页面的修改，再打开发布向导

disabled.en: Domain is disabled; enable it first

degraded.en: Runtime is degraded; go to Diagnostics first
degraded.zh-CN: 运行时处于 degraded，请先前往 Diagnostics

busy.en: A publish task is already running
busy.zh-CN: 已有发布任务正在运行

primaryDomainDesc.en: Accepts standard ASCII or Punycode only; no protocol, port, or path.
primaryDomainDesc.zh-CN: 只接受标准 ASCII 或 Punycode 域名，不包含协议、端口和路径。

aliasesDesc.en: Separate multiple aliases with commas; the system will dedupe automatically.
aliasesDesc.zh-CN: 使用逗号分隔多个别名，系统会自动去重。

websocketDesc.en: Injects controlled Upgrade and Connection headers.
websocketDesc.zh-CN: 注入受控的 Upgrade 和 Connection headers。

preserveHostDesc.en: Pass the original request Host to the upstream.
preserveHostDesc.zh-CN: 向 upstream 传递原始请求 Host。

enableHttpsDesc.en: Only stores the intent here; creating a draft will not request a certificate.
enableHttpsDesc.zh-CN: 这里只保存申请意图，创建草稿不会申请证书。

autoRenewDesc.en: Renews according to this policy once the certificate module is complete.
autoRenewDesc.zh-CN: 证书模块完成后按此策略续期。

forceHttpsDesc.en: After publish, uses 308 to preserve request method and body.
forceHttpsDesc.zh-CN: 发布后使用 308 保留请求 method 和 body。

v1AlertTitle.zh-CN: 即将创建 v1 草稿

v1AlertDescription.en: {{hostname}}, {{count}} initial route(s), HTTPS {{https}}. Live Nginx will not change.
v1AlertDescription.zh-CN: {{hostname}}，{{count}} 条初始路由，HTTPS {{https}}。线上 Nginx 不会改变。

targetUrl.en: Enter a full HTTP or HTTPS URL
targetUrl.zh-CN: 请输入完整的 HTTP 或 HTTPS URL

staticRoot.en: Static root must be an absolute path
staticRoot.zh-CN: 静态目录必须是绝对路径

emailRequired.en: A valid email is required when HTTPS is enabled
emailRequired.zh-CN: 启用 HTTPS 时需要有效邮箱

pathDesc.en: Standard prefix location; Nginx uses longest-prefix match.
pathDesc.zh-CN: 普通前缀 location，Nginx 自动使用最长前缀匹配。

preserveHostDesc.en: Pass the original Host to the upstream.
preserveHostDesc.zh-CN: 向 upstream 传递原始 Host。

spaFallbackDesc.en: Falls back to Index when a resource is not found.
spaFallbackDesc.zh-CN: 未找到资源时回退到 Index。

enabledDesc.en: When off, kept in the version JSON but no location is generated.
enabledDesc.zh-CN: 关闭后保留在版本 JSON，但不生成 location。

targetUrl.en: Enter a full HTTP or HTTPS URL
targetUrl.zh-CN: 请输入完整的 HTTP 或 HTTPS URL

staticRoot.en: Static root must be an absolute path
staticRoot.zh-CN: 静态目录必须是绝对路径

pathDuplicate.en: Paths must be unique within the same domain
pathDuplicate.zh-CN: 同一域名中的路径不能重复

valueDesc.en: No newlines or NUL; the Nginx generator will safely quote this value.
valueDesc.zh-CN: 禁止换行和 NUL；Nginx 生成器会安全引用该值。

scopeDesc.en: Server applies to the whole domain; Route is written only into the specified location.
scopeDesc.zh-CN: Server 应用于整个域名；Route 只写入指定 location。

alwaysDesc.en: Add this header to non-success responses as well.
alwaysDesc.zh-CN: 在非成功响应中也添加该 Header。

enabledDesc.en: When off, kept in the snapshot but no add_header is generated.
enabledDesc.zh-CN: 关闭后保留在快照中，但不生成 add_header。

hstsWarning.en: HSTS is cached by browsers for a long time; confirm all subdomains support HTTPS before using includeSubDomains.
hstsWarning.zh-CN: HSTS 会被浏览器长期缓存；使用 includeSubDomains 前请确认所有子域都支持 HTTPS。

valueInvalid.en: Header value cannot contain newline or NUL
valueInvalid.zh-CN: Header 值不能包含换行或 NUL

hstsRequiresHttps.zh-CN: 启用 HTTPS 后才能添加 HSTS

cardDescription.en: Saving only updates the draft; certificate request and config publish are separate steps.
cardDescription.zh-CN: 保存只更新草稿；证书申请和配置发布是两个独立步骤。

acmeEmailDesc.en: Used for Let's Encrypt expiry and account notifications.
acmeEmailDesc.zh-CN: 用于 Let's Encrypt 到期和账户通知。

validationDescCloudflare.en: Cloudflare mode creates and deletes TXT records precisely at terminal state.
validationDescCloudflare.zh-CN: Cloudflare 模式会自动创建并在终态精确删除 TXT 记录。

validationDescEmpty.en: Add credentials in Settings / Cloudflare DNS first.
validationDescEmpty.zh-CN: 请先在 Settings / Cloudflare DNS 添加凭据。
